name: Paella Panamanian Style
recipeIngredient: 4 each Pork Chops, Cut Into Small Cubes
2 lbs Pork Sausage, Cut Into Small Pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut and fry the chicken well.
2. Make a sauce with 1 1/2 onions, 1 1/2 green peppers, 1 1/2 tomatoes, minced garlic, and chick pea liquid. Add water and cook on low heat.
3. Fry sausage in small pieces and pork chops separately.
4. Boil the lobsters and shrimp; peel them. Clean and slice clams, squid, and mussels.
5. Make a sauce with 1 1/2 onions, 1 1/2 green peppers, 1 1/2 tomatoes, chopped pepper, tomato paste, and tomato sauce.
6. Separate meat from bones of all meats. Cook the clams with scallions and parsley.
7. In a large, deep pot, fry 6 tablespoons oil with rice (wash and cook rice three times). Add seafood cooking liquid (about 5 cups).
8. Add sausage, chicken, pork sauces, shrimp, lobster, squid, mussels, and their sauces. Include the remaining sauce made with onions, scallions, chopped pepper, tomato paste, and tomato sauce.
9. Add chick peas and olives. Cook at high heat for 10 minutes; cover and cook at low heat for 45 minutes.
10. Garnish with strips of green peppers and olives before serving.
